text.title: Vector DB Security — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: Qdrant hardened with API-key auth + TLS + private subnet + LUKS + audit.

example.title: security-config.yaml for Qdrant prod (GDPR scope)
example.code:
auth: enabled: true method: api-key source: aws-ssm:/qdrant/prod/api-key rotation_days: 90
tls: enabled: true min_version: "1.3" cert_source: cert-manager rotation_days: 90
network: binding: 10.20.30.40:6333 # private subnet only public_internet_exposed: false ingress_via: internal-lb
encryption_at_rest: enabled: true method: luks kms_key_id: arn:aws:kms:eu-central-1:...
audit: enabled: true sink: s3://prod-audit/qdrant-admin/ immutable: true
pii: detection: presidio redaction: pseudonymise retention_days: 365 erasure_sla_hours: 168 # 7 days — well under GDPR 30d runbook_url: https://runbooks.example.com/qdrant-erasure
example.note: Covers all 5 rules: auth on, TLS 1.3, private bind, immutable audit, PII with 7d SLA.
